Pushpanjali Technical Institute

Dakor, Gujarat

Empowering Skills for a Better Future

Welcome to Pushpanjali Technical Institute, a premier destination for skill development and vocational training in Dakor. We are committed to providing quality education that transforms lives and builds successful careers.

Explore Courses Contact Us

About Us

Building futures through quality education and skill development

Pushpanjali Technical Institute is run by the Salesian Sisters of Don Bosco. The congregation is a worldwide institution spread across six continents and working in 98 countries. It was founded by Saint John Bosco (Don Bosco) along with Saint Maria Domenica Mazzarello in Mornese, Italy, on 5th August 1872.

Our History

Pushpanjali Technical Institute began in the year 1995 with typing, cutting, and sewing technology. Later, in 2000, computer classes were introduced with a few trainees from the locality. After years of struggle and hard work, the institute received government recognition as an ITI, offering various trades that help young people secure employment opportunities, including government jobs.

Our Educational Philosophy

We provide life skills and personality development along with technical education. Holistic education is our aim. We follow the Salesian Way of Education, also known as the Preventive System, founded by Saint John Bosco and Saint Maria Domenica Mazzarello, based on three pillars:

Reason

Religion

Loving Kindness

This educational approach creates a family atmosphere where trainees feel welcomed, respected, guided, and encouraged to grow into responsible and skilled individuals.

Hostel Facilities

We provide hostel facilities for girls, especially for trainees coming from distant areas.

Our Commitment

Pushpanjali Technical Institute is committed to empowering youth, especially young women, through skill development, value-based education, and holistic growth.

Our Mission

To provide accessible, affordable, and quality skill development training that empowers individuals with practical knowledge and industry-relevant skills, enabling them to build successful careers and contribute to society.

Our Vision

To become the leading technical institute in Gujarat, recognized for excellence in vocational training and skill development, creating a skilled workforce that meets the demands of modern industries.

Quality Education

We focus on providing hands-on training with experienced instructors who bring real-world expertise to the classroom.

Skill Development Focus

Our curriculum is designed to develop practical skills that are immediately applicable in professional environments.

Career Opportunities

We prepare students for employment and entrepreneurship with industry-recognized certifications and practical training.

Community Impact

Located in Dakor, we serve the local community by making quality technical education accessible to all.

Courses Offered

Industry-relevant courses designed to enhance your skills and career prospects

COPA

Computer Operator and Programming Assistant

  • Programming fundamentals (C, C++, Java)
  • Database management
  • Web development basics
  • Computer operations & maintenance

Career Opportunities:

Computer Operator, Data Entry Operator, Junior Programmer, IT Support

Beauty Parlour

Professional Beauty & Cosmetology

  • Hair cutting & styling
  • Makeup artistry
  • Skin care & facials
  • Nail art & manicure/pedicure

Career Opportunities:

Beauty Consultant, Makeup Artist, Salon Manager, Entrepreneur

Tailoring

Professional Fashion Design & Tailoring

  • Garment construction
  • Pattern making & cutting
  • Machine & hand stitching
  • Fashion design basics

Career Opportunities:

Fashion Designer, Boutique Owner, Tailor, Costume Designer

Basic Computer

Computer Fundamentals & MS Office

  • Computer basics & Windows
  • MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint
  • Internet & email
  • Typing & data entry

Career Opportunities:

Office Administrator, Data Entry, Receptionist, Clerical Jobs

Practical Training
Certification
Career Guidance
